response.justification: Experienced software engineer with 30+ years of proven expertise in testing, quality practices, and diverse technical domains. However, critically fails to meet minimum qualifications for this role—most notably, only ~1-2 years of C++ experience versus the required 8 years. Additionally, while demonstrating scattered cloud infrastructure work (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker), the depth and duration in modern cloud compute platforms and distributed systems falls substantially short of the 5-year requirement. Technical leadership is implied through Staff roles but not clearly evidenced in strategic direction or team mentoring.
strengths: Extensive software engineering background (30+ years) with multiple Staff-level positions demonstrating technical depth
Strong emphasis on testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship—created testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and taught quality practices
Some relevant cloud and infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD infrastructure setup)
concerns: C++ programming experience (~1-2 years: 6 months at National Instruments, bachelor thesis work) falls drastically short of 8-year minimum requirement
Cloud/distributed systems depth inadequate—modern cloud infrastructure work scattered; Dunnhumby micro-services role was 20 years ago
Technical leadership of teams not clearly documented—Staff roles present but no explicit evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or driving large-scale infrastructure strategy

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform depth and focus
